[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Banners](https://www.banners.com/banners) 3. Economy Banners # Economy Banners ### Design Simple & Economical Banners ![Now hiring economy banner hanging above a stores door.](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/shutterstock_2498655369 (1).jpg) * [Product Overview](#da7f5f22-21c5-4350-b0f8-89a1b2cb912d) Economy banners from Banners.com offer a cost-effective solution for anyone looking to promote an event, sale, or announcement without breaking the bank. These banners are perfect for budget-conscious customers who need high-quality promotional materials. #### [Material Options](#material-optionsCollapse) #### Banner Materials Our economy banners are crafted from durable yet affordable materials, ensuring they look great and last for the duration of your event or promotion. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. **13 oz Matte** **Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut. **13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high end look. **18 oz Vinyl Banners** Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality. [Click here to request a sample packet of materials](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) #### [Finishing Options](#finishing-optionsCollapse) #### Finishing Options **Hems & Grommets** **Reinforced Hems** **Reinforced Corners** **Pole Pockets** ![Vinyl Banners Hems and Grommet Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/291886d1-dd6d-4fdf-9f62-c5b6826dba17.jpg) ![Vinyl Banner Reinforced Hem Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Reinforced-Hems-for-Vinyl-Banners.jpg) ![Vinyl Banner Reinforced Corner Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Reinforced Corners for Vinyl Banners.jpg) ![Vinyl Banner Pole Pocket Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/728828a0-b142-4abc-98ec-5b404600dca9.jpg) Is a one inch fold, heat welded hem with grommets typically added every 2 -4 feet. A thick weblike material (similar to what is used in seatbelts) is heat welded to the perimeter of the banner to provide additional reinforcement. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to the corners of the banner and secured with grommets to improve both the strength and durability in the corners of the banner. A pocket or sleeve added to the banner to allow for a dowel or pole to run through it for support. When selecting pole pockets there will be no increase in the finished size of the banner. #### Heat Welded Hems & Grommets Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over to the backside of the banner and heated together to form a clean and strong one-inch hem. We recommend having hems for all banners to increase the strength and durability of the banner. You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your banne
